requirement_topic.en: Market Access — TBS Mandatory Conformity via PVoC, Certificate of Conformity and TBS Mark
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——TBS通过PVoC、符合性证书及TBS标志实施的强制符合性
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——TBS通過PVoC、符合性證書及TBS標誌實施的強制符合性

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances entering Tanzania are regulated products under the Tanzania Bureau of Standards (TBS) mandatory conformity system. For imports, the controlling mechanism is the Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme: before shipment, each regulated consignment must obtain a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) issued by a TBS-appointed PVoC body in the country of export (China), based on testing/inspection against the applicable Tanzania Standard (TZS) — which for refrigerators adopts IEC 60335-2-24 (safety), the CISPR 14 series (EMC), and the IEC 62552 series (energy), as applicable. There are routes for one-off (consignment-by-consignment), registration, and licensing (frequent importers). Approved products carry the TBS conformity mark. A valid CoC is required for the goods to clear customs; consignments arriving without a CoC face destination inspection, penalty fees, or rejection. The main port of entry is Dar es Salaam. A Chinese CCC certificate does not substitute for the TBS CoC.
summary.zh: 进入坦桑尼亚的家用制冷器具是坦桑尼亚标准局（TBS）强制符合性体系下的受管制产品。对于进口，管控机制为出口前符合性验证（PVoC）计划：发货前，每批受管制货物须由出口国（中国）的TBS指定PVoC机构签发符合性证书（CoC），依据适用的坦桑尼亚标准（TZS）进行检测/查验——电冰箱方面采用IEC 60335-2-24（安全）、CISPR 14系列（电磁兼容）及IEC 62552系列（能效，视适用情况）。有一次性（逐批）、注册及许可（常规进口商）等路径。获批产品加贴TBS符合性标志。货物清关须有有效CoC；无CoC到货的货物面临目的地查验、罚款或退运。主要入境口岸为达累斯萨拉姆。中国CCC证书不能替代TBS CoC。
summary.zht: 進入坦尚尼亞的家用製冷器具是坦尚尼亞標準局（TBS）強制符合性體系下的受管制產品。對於進口，管控機制為出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）計畫：發貨前，每批受管制貨物須由出口國（中國）的TBS指定PVoC機構簽發符合性證書（CoC），依據適用的坦尚尼亞標準（TZS）進行檢測/查驗——電冰箱方面採用IEC 60335-2-24（安全）、CISPR 14系列（電磁相容）及IEC 62552系列（能效，視適用情況）。有一次性（逐批）、註冊及許可（常規進口商）等路徑。獲批產品加貼TBS符合性標誌。貨物清關須有有效CoC；無CoC到貨的貨物面臨目的地查驗、罰款或退運。主要入境口岸為達累斯薩拉姆。中國CCC證書不能替代TBS CoC。

standards_or_laws: Standards Act (Tanzania) — TBS mandate for mandatory product standards and conformity
TBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — Certificate of Conformity (CoC) required per regulated consignment before shipment
TZS adopting IEC 60335-2-24 / CISPR 14 series / IEC 62552 series — applicable standards for refrigerators under PVoC
TBS conformity mark — affixed to approved products

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before domestic sale, plus the China Energy Label (GB 12021.2). CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies; it is a product/model certification valid in the domestic market, not a per-consignment export verification. There is no single mark in China equivalent to a TBS CoC: CCC and the China Energy Label are separate domestic schemes. A Chinese CCC certificate evidences conformity to Chinese GB standards but is not recognised as a Tanzanian Certificate of Conformity.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在国内销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），以及中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构审核；它是国内市场有效的产品/型号认证，而非逐批出口验证。中国没有等同于TBS CoC的单一标志：CCC与中国能效标识为独立的国内制度。中国CCC证书证明符合中国GB标准，但不被承认为坦桑尼亚符合性证书。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在國內銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），以及中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構審核；它是國內市場有效的產品/型號認證，而非逐批出口驗證。中國沒有等同於TBS CoC的單一標誌：CCC與中國能效標識為獨立的國內制度。中國CCC證書證明符合中國GB標準，但不被承認為坦尚尼亞符合性證書。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR; domestic product/model certification
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: The market-access mechanism differs in kind: China uses domestic CCC product/model certification; Tanzania uses per-consignment export verification (PVoC) plus the TBS mark. Chinese exporters must build a Tanzania-specific package: (1) Certificate of Conformity — obtained under the TBS PVoC programme through a TBS-appointed inspection body before each shipment (or via the registration/licensing route for frequent importers), based on testing to the applicable TZS (IEC 60335-2-24 / CISPR 14 / IEC 62552); an IECEE CB Scheme report can support this. (2) TBS conformity mark — affixed to approved products. (3) Documentation — test reports, technical documentation, and refrigerant/energy declarations matching the TZS standards. (4) Voltage/plug — products supplied for 230 V / 50 Hz with a BS 1363 (Type G) plug. A Chinese CCC certificate alone does not allow customs clearance; without a valid CoC the consignment can be held, surcharged, or refused entry at Dar es Salaam.
gap.zh: 市场准入机制性质不同：中国采用国内CCC产品/型号认证；坦桑尼亚采用逐批出口验证（PVoC）加TBS标志。中国出口商须建立坦桑尼亚专用文件包：（1）符合性证书——在每批发货前通过TBS指定查验机构依TBS PVoC计划取得（或常规进口商通过注册/许可路径），依据适用TZS（IEC 60335-2-24/CISPR 14/IEC 62552）检测；IECEE CB体系报告可作支撑。（2）TBS符合性标志——加贴于获批产品。（3）文件——与TZS标准匹配的检测报告、技术文件及制冷剂/能效声明。（4）电压/插头——产品按230 V/50 Hz供应并配BS 1363（G型）插头。仅有中国CCC证书不能清关；无有效CoC，货物可能在达累斯萨拉姆被扣留、加收费用或拒绝入境。
gap.zht: 市場准入機制性質不同：中國採用國內CCC產品/型號認證；坦尚尼亞採用逐批出口驗證（PVoC）加TBS標誌。中國出口商須建立坦尚尼亞專用文件包：（1）符合性證書——在每批發貨前通過TBS指定查驗機構依TBS PVoC計畫取得（或常規進口商通過註冊/許可路徑），依據適用TZS（IEC 60335-2-24/CISPR 14/IEC 62552）檢測；IECEE CB體系報告可作支撐。（2）TBS符合性標誌——加貼於獲批產品。（3）文件——與TZS標準匹配的檢測報告、技術文件及製冷劑/能效聲明。（4）電壓/插頭——產品按230 V/50 Hz供應並配BS 1363（G型）插頭。僅有中國CCC證書不能清關；無有效CoC，貨物可能在達累斯薩拉姆被扣留、加收費用或拒絕入境。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a TBS Certificate of Conformity under the PVoC programme is required before each regulated consignment ships, plus the TBS conformity mark on approved products; required for customs clearance at Dar es Salaam
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access for household refrigerators in Tanzania runs through the TBS mandatory conformity system: a Certificate of Conformity under the Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme is required per consignment before shipment, plus the TBS mark on approved products, with testing to the TZS adopting IEC 60335-2-24 / CISPR 14 / IEC 62552. Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label are separate domestic schemes and do not substitute for the TBS CoC; without a valid CoC the goods can be held or refused at Dar es Salaam.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 坦桑尼亚家用电冰箱的市场准入通过TBS强制符合性体系：每批货物在发货前须取得出口前符合性验证（PVoC）计划下的符合性证书，并在获批产品上加贴TBS标志，检测依据采用IEC 60335-2-24/CISPR 14/IEC 62552的TZS标准。中国CCC及中国能效标识为独立的国内制度，不能替代TBS CoC；无有效CoC，货物可能在达累斯萨拉姆被扣留或拒绝入境。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 坦尚尼亞家用電冰箱的市場准入通過TBS強制符合性體系：每批貨物在發貨前須取得出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）計畫下的符合性證書，並在獲批產品上加貼TBS標誌，檢測依據採用IEC 60335-2-24/CISPR 14/IEC 62552的TZS標準。中國CCC及中國能效標識為獨立的國內制度，不能替代TBS CoC；無有效CoC，貨物可能在達累斯薩拉姆被扣留或拒絕入境。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer of Record — Tanzanian Importer for Clearance and Responsibility
requirement_topic.zh: 在地记录进口商——负责清关与责任的坦桑尼亚进口商
requirement_topic.zht: 在地記錄進口商——負責清關與責任的坦尚尼亞進口商

summary.en: Goods placed on the Tanzanian market must be imported by a locally established importer of record. For household refrigerating appliances, the Tanzanian importer is the economic operator who clears the consignment through the Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) customs at the port of entry (principally Dar es Salaam), holds the TBS Certificate of Conformity for the consignment, and is the local point of responsibility for the regulated product. The importer must be a registered Tanzanian business with a Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN), handle import declaration and duties/VAT, and present the CoC and supporting documentation at clearance. Frequent importers may operate under the PVoC registration or licensing route to streamline repeat consignments. Unlike the EU, Tanzania does not require the foreign manufacturer to appoint a stand-alone in-country 'authorised representative' separate from the importer — the in-country importer fulfils the responsible-operator role.
summary.zh: 投放坦桑尼亚市场的货物须由在地设立的记录进口商进口。对于家用制冷器具，坦桑尼亚进口商是通过坦桑尼亚税务局（TRA）海关在入境口岸（主要为达累斯萨拉姆）清关、持有该批货物TBS符合性证书、并作为受管制产品在地责任方的经济运营商。进口商须为持有纳税人识别号（TIN）的注册坦桑尼亚企业，办理进口申报及关税/增值税，并在清关时出示CoC及支撑文件。常规进口商可通过PVoC注册或许可路径以简化重复货物。与欧盟不同，坦桑尼亚不要求境外制造商在进口商之外另行委任独立的在地「授权代表」——在地进口商履行责任运营商角色。
summary.zht: 投放坦尚尼亞市場的貨物須由在地設立的記錄進口商進口。對於家用製冷器具，坦尚尼亞進口商是通過坦尚尼亞稅務局（TRA）海關在入境口岸（主要為達累斯薩拉姆）清關、持有該批貨物TBS符合性證書、並作為受管制產品在地責任方的經濟運營商。進口商須為持有納稅人識別號（TIN）的註冊坦尚尼亞企業，辦理進口申報及關稅/增值稅，並在清關時出示CoC及支撐文件。常規進口商可通過PVoC註冊或許可路徑以簡化重複貨物。與歐盟不同，坦尚尼亞不要求境外製造商在進口商之外另行委任獨立的在地「授權代表」——在地進口商履行責任運營商角色。

standards_or_laws: Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) customs requirements — registered importer of record with Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN) for import declaration and clearance at the port of entry
TBS PVoC programme — importer holds the Certificate of Conformity for the regulated consignment at clearance
East African Community Customs Management Act — regional customs framework applicable to Tanzania imports

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring a manufacturer of export-bound products to designate a foreign-country importer of record or authorised representative under Chinese law. Chinese export manufacturers commercially appoint overseas distributors or buyers, but there is no statutory Chinese obligation analogous to the destination-market importer-of-record/responsible-operator role. Domestically, the CCC certificate holder is the responsible party for the Chinese market — this does not extend to or satisfy Tanzanian import-clearance or responsible-operator requirements.
summary.zh: 中国法律没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口产品制造商指定目的国记录进口商或授权代表。中国出口制造商以商业方式委任海外经销商或买方，但不存在与目的市场记录进口商/责任运营商角色类似的中国法定义务。在国内，CCC证书持有人为中国市场的责任方——该角色不延伸至坦桑尼亚进口清关或责任运营商要求，亦不能满足后者。
summary.zht: 中國法律沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口產品製造商指定目的國記錄進口商或授權代表。中國出口製造商以商業方式委任海外經銷商或買方，但不存在與目的市場記錄進口商/責任運營商角色類似的中國法定義務。在國內，CCC證書持有人為中國市場的責任方——該角色不延伸至坦尚尼亞進口清關或責任運營商要求，亦不能滿足後者。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent requiring designation of a destination-market importer of record

gap.en: This is a structural requirement with no Chinese regulatory analogue. A Chinese refrigerator manufacturer cannot place goods on the Tanzanian market without a Tanzanian importer of record: (1) the importer must be a TRA-registered business with a TIN that handles the import declaration, duties and VAT; (2) the importer holds the TBS Certificate of Conformity for the consignment and presents it at clearance; (3) responsibility for the regulated product in-market sits with the importer. Note the difference from the EU model: Tanzania does not require a separate manufacturer-appointed 'authorised representative' distinct from the importer — the in-country importer is the responsible operator. Exporters selling direct-to-consumer or without a local importer must therefore establish or contract a Tanzanian importer before shipment; goods cannot self-clear.
gap.zh: 这是一项在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性要求。中国电冰箱制造商在没有坦桑尼亚记录进口商的情况下不能将货物投放坦桑尼亚市场：（1）进口商须为持有TIN、办理进口申报、关税及增值税的TRA注册企业；（2）进口商持有该批货物的TBS符合性证书并在清关时出示；（3）受管制产品在市场内的责任由进口商承担。注意与欧盟模式的差异：坦桑尼亚不要求在进口商之外另行委任独立的制造商「授权代表」——在地进口商即责任运营商。因此，直接面向消费者销售或没有在地进口商的出口商须在发货前设立或委托坦桑尼亚进口商；货物不能自行清关。
gap.zht: 這是一項在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性要求。中國電冰箱製造商在沒有坦尚尼亞記錄進口商的情況下不能將貨物投放坦尚尼亞市場：（1）進口商須為持有TIN、辦理進口申報、關稅及增值稅的TRA註冊企業；（2）進口商持有該批貨物的TBS符合性證書並在清關時出示；（3）受管制產品在市場內的責任由進口商承擔。注意與歐盟模式的差異：坦尚尼亞不要求在進口商之外另行委任獨立的製造商「授權代表」——在地進口商即責任運營商。因此，直接面向消費者銷售或沒有在地進口商的出口商須在發貨前設立或委託坦尚尼亞進口商；貨物不能自行清關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a Tanzanian importer of record (TRA-registered, with TIN) is required to clear and place the goods, holding the TBS Certificate of Conformity; no separate EU-style 'authorised representative' distinct from the importer is required
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation under Chinese law to designate a destination-market importer of record

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A locally established Tanzanian importer of record (TRA-registered, with a TIN) is required to clear household refrigerators at the port of entry and is the in-market responsible operator holding the TBS Certificate of Conformity. There is no Chinese-law equivalent, and unlike the EU, Tanzania does not require a separate manufacturer-appointed authorised representative distinct from the importer. Exporters without a local importer must establish or contract one before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 须有在地设立的坦桑尼亚记录进口商（TRA注册、持有TIN）在入境口岸为家用电冰箱清关，并作为持有TBS符合性证书的市场内责任运营商。中国法律无对应规定，且与欧盟不同，坦桑尼亚不要求在进口商之外另行委任制造商授权代表。没有在地进口商的出口商须在发货前设立或委托一家。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 須有在地設立的坦尚尼亞記錄進口商（TRA註冊、持有TIN）在入境口岸為家用電冰箱清關，並作為持有TBS符合性證書的市場內責任運營商。中國法律無對應規定，且與歐盟不同，坦尚尼亞不要求在進口商之外另行委任製造商授權代表。沒有在地進口商的出口商須在發貨前設立或委託一家。
